parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Optional grouping mode. Use claim_type to return grouped_templates.

example.name: Property Damage - Formal Demand Letter V1
example.content_html:
{{letter_date}}

{{defendant_name}}
{{defendant_address}}
{{defendant_city_state_zip}}

Re: Formal Demand for Payment - Property Damage ({{claim_amount}})

Dear {{defendant_name}},

This letter is a formal demand for payment in the amount of ${{claim_amount}} for property damage caused by your actions, based on the incident that occurred on {{incident_date}}.

Incident summary: {{claim_description}}

Please remit full payment within {{response_deadline}} from the date of this letter. If payment is not received, I will proceed with filing in {{court_name}}, {{county_name}}, without further notice.

Sincerely,

{{claimant_name}}
{{claimant_address}}
{{claimant_city_state_zip}}

example.name: Property Damage - Formal Demand Letter V1
example.content_html:
{{letter_date}}

{{defendant_city_state_zip}}

Re: Formal Demand for Payment - Property Damage ({{claim_amount}})

Dear {{defendant_name}},

This letter is a formal demand for payment in the amount of ${{claim_amount}} for property damage caused by your actions, based on the incident that occurred on {{incident_date}}.

Incident summary: {{claim_description}}

Please remit full payment within {{response_deadline}} from the date of this letter. If payment is not received, I will proceed with filing in {{court_name}}, {{county_name}}, without further notice.

Sincerely,

{{claimant_name}}
{{claimant_address}}
{{claimant_city_state_zip}}

get.description: Dropbox OAuth callback configured in the Dropbox app. Usually reached by Dropbox redirect, not called manually.

post.description: Starts Dropbox OAuth for the customer claim evidence flow and returns authorization_url.

delete.description: Disconnects the customer Dropbox connection. Existing evidence metadata/shared links are not deleted.

get.description: Returns Dropbox connection status, including dropbox_email_verified.

delete.description: Deletes one evidence file from Dropbox and removes its metadata.

get.description: Lists evidence items and their files for the customer claim.

post.description: Creates an evidence item. Allowed types: receipt, photo, video, audio, screenshot, email_message, document, other.

example.title: Passenger complaint screenshot
example.notes: Screenshot from the platform support conversation.

patch.description: Updates title, type, and/or notes for an evidence item.

example.title: Updated passenger complaint screenshot
example.notes: Updated notes for this evidence item.

delete.description: Deletes an evidence item and all related Dropbox files.

post.description: Uploads one evidence file to the customer Dropbox account. Multipart field: file. Current limit: 100 MB.

file.description: Evidence file to upload to Dropbox

post.description: Uses AI to suggest evidence upload items for the claim. Response includes ai_usage_log_id.

example.description: Please update the amount paragraph and improve clarity.

post.description: Accepts multipart/form-data (file + payload JSON string) or application/json (payload object + optional attachment_url / attachment_storage_path).

attachment_url.description: Optional URL when no file upload is used

attachment_storage_path.description: Optional storage path when attachment already exists

post.description: Address assist for customer + defendant. Supports business (existing_business_id or manual address) and individual (manual address).

claim.description: My driver account access was blocked without justification and despite repeated support tickets. I need compensation for lost earnings and related damages.
My driver account access was blocked without justification and despite repeated support tickets. I need compensation for lost earnings and related damages.
The defendant charged me incorrectly and ignored multiple refund requests. I am requesting reimbursement of the amount charged plus related losses.

example.letter_html:
2026-04-16

Defendant Name
1 Infinite Loop
Cupertino, CA, 95014

Re: Consumer Dispute Demand (250.00)

Dear Defendant Name,

I demand payment of $250.00 due to damages and losses from a consumer transaction issue that occurred on 2026-03-01T00:00:00.000Z.

Claim summary: word1 word2 word3 word4 word5 word6 word7 word8 word9 word10 word11 word12 word13 word14 word15 word16 word17 word18 word19 word20 word21 word22 word23 word24 word25 word26 word27 word28 word29 word30 word31 word32 word33 word34 word35 word36 word37 word38 word39 word40 word41 word42 word43 word44 word45 word46 word47 word48 word49 word50 word51 word52 word53 word54 word55 word56 word57 word58 word59 word60 word61 word62 word63 word64 word65 word66 word67 word68 word69 word70 word71 word72 word73 word74 word75 word76 word77 word78 word79 word80 word81 word82 word83 word84 word85 word86 word87 word88 word89 word90 word91 word92 word93 word94 word95 word96 word97 word98 word99 word100 word101 word102 word103 word104 word22 word23 word24 word25 word26 word27 word28 word29 word30 word31 word32 word33 word34 word35 word36 word37 word38 word39 word40 word41 word42 word43 word44 word45 word46 word47 word48 word49 word50 word51 word52 word53 word54 word55 word56 word57 word58 word59 word60 word61 word62 word63 word64 word65 word66 word67 word68 word69 word70 word71 word72 word73 word74 word75 word76 word77 word78 word79 word80 word81 word82 word83 word84 word85 word86 word87 word88 word89 word90 word91 word92 word93 word94 word95 word96 word97 word98 word99 word100 word101 word102 word103 word104word22 word23 word24 word25 word26 word27 word28 word29 word30 word31 word32 word33 word34 word35 word36 word37 word38 word39 word40 word41 word42 word43 word44 word45 word46 word47 word48 word49 word50 word51 word52 word53 word54 word55 word56 word57 word58 word59 word60 word61 word62 word63 word64 word65 word66 word67 word68 word69 word70 word71 word72 word73 word74 word75 word76 word77 word78 word79 word80 word81 word82 word83 word84 word85 word86 word87 word88 word89 word90 word91 word92 word93 word94 word95 word96 word97 word98 word99 word100 word101 word102 word103 word104 word105 word106 word107 word108 word109 word110

Please submit payment within 10 business days. If you fail to resolve this matter, I will file in Santa Clara County Small Claims Court, Santa Clara County, and seek all available costs.

This letter is your final opportunity to resolve the dispute without court intervention.

Sincerely,

Test Customer
1600 Amphitheatre Parkway
Mountain View, CA, 94043
